headline: Kylian Mbappe
body: Jurgen Klopp has detailed how he tried to sign Kylian Mbappe for Liverpool in 2017 before the forward moved to Paris Saint-Germain. “The most expensive non-transfer (Liverpool) invested in,” Klopp told German broadcaster Magenta TV. “We flew from Blackpool to Nice. In Nice, the entire Mbappe family boarded a private jet with five rooms or something. “We really went all out. Then we flew around in a circle, talked with the family, ate good food. “And then he went to Paris.” More from samjoseph_17 🔗 nyti.ms/4freEgG
raw_text:
Jurgen Klopp has detailed how he tried to sign Kylian Mbappe for Liverpool in 2017 before the forward moved to Paris Saint-Germain.

“The most expensive non-transfer (Liverpool) invested in,” Klopp told German broadcaster Magenta TV.

“We flew from Blackpool to Nice. In Nice, the entire Mbappe family boarded a private jet with five rooms or something.

“We really went all out. Then we flew around in a circle, talked with the family, ate good food.

“And then he went to Paris.”

More from @samjoseph_17 

🔗 nyti.ms/4freEgG
text:
Jurgen Klopp has detailed how he tried to sign Kylian Mbappe for Liverpool in 2017 before the forward moved to Paris Saint-Germain.

“The most expensive non-transfer (Liverpool) invested in,” Klopp told German broadcaster Magenta TV.

“We flew from Blackpool to Nice. In Nice, the entire Mbappe family boarded a private jet with five rooms or something.

“We really went all out. Then we flew around in a circle, talked with the family, ate good food.

“And then he went to Paris.”

More from @samjoseph_17 

🔗 nyti.ms/4freEgG
